title: Player2 AI NPC Pack
description: This modpack is a vanilla + AI themed pack that exclusively features Player2 AI NPC by user Goodbird. A mod that adds AI powered companions to the game.
body:
Player2 AI NPC is a mod centered around playing minecraft with AI companions that will follow you around, build, talk to you, and talk to other AI NPCs among other things. This pack is designed to be lightweight and only includes the dependencies for the Player2 AI NPC mod and no other mods with additional gameplay elements. The purpose is to give users an easy way to quickly start playing with the mod without fussing with dependencies, modloaders, and getting correct versions.

When running this modpack ensure the player2 app is running or the mods will not work. You can find it at: [https://player2.game/](https://player2.game/)

I am not directly affilliated with the player2 AI NPC mod or any of the mods included in this modpack. If you wish for tech support related to player2 I recommend joining the player2 discord: https://discord.com/invite/ts6ABvfC48
